package rulefixtures

import (
	"strings"
)

// scenario for strings_index_any_not_minus_one_contains_any: `strings.IndexAny(...) != -1` presence checks instead of `strings.ContainsAny(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario658Negative(haystack string, needle string, left string, right string) bool {
	return strings.Contains(haystack, needle)
}
